details.question: Give me class 6 students in Anantapur with 12 or more absences in 2025, including school and social category.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              st.citizen_student_id_pk,
              st.student_name,
              st.gender,
              st.social_category,
              st.current_grade,
              sc.school_udise_code,
              sc.school_name,
              sc.mandal_name,
              COUNT(*) AS absent_days
            FROM curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
              ON st.citizen_student_id_pk = att.citizen_student_id_fk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = att.student_school_id_fk
            WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'
              AND att.absent_flag = 'Y'
              AND st.current_grade = '6'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
              AND COALESCE(st.is_current_flag, st.is_current) = 'Y'
            GROUP BY
              st.citizen_student_id_pk, st.student_name, st.gender,
              st.social_category, st.current_grade, sc.school_udise_code,
              sc.school_name, sc.mandal_name
            HAVING COUNT(*) >= 12
            ORDER BY absent_days DESC

details.question: Which schools in Anantapur have attendance below 55% in 2025-26?
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              sc.district_name,
              sc.mandal_name,
              sc.school_udise_code,
              sc.school_name,
              COUNT(*) AS attendance_records,
              SUM(CASE WHEN att.present_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS present_records,
              ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN att.present_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS attendance_pct
            FROM curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = att.student_school_id_fk
            WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
            GROUP BY sc.district_name, sc.mandal_name, sc.school_udise_code, sc.school_name
            HAVING ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN att.present_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) < 55
            ORDER BY attendance_pct ASC, attendance_records DESC

details.question: Show SC students in Anantapur who have both exam failure and attendance risk in 2025.
details.ground_truth_sql:
WITH absences AS (
              SELECT citizen_student_id_fk, COUNT(*) AS absent_days
              FROM curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact
              WHERE academic_year = '2025' AND absent_flag = 'Y'
              GROUP BY citizen_student_id_fk
            ),
            failures AS (
              SELECT citizen_student_id_fk, COUNT(*) AS failed_assessments
              FROM curated_datamodels.school_academic_performance_fact
              WHERE academic_year = '2025' AND fail_flag = 'Y'
              GROUP BY citizen_student_id_fk
            )
            SELECT
              st.citizen_student_id_pk,
              st.student_name,
              st.social_category,
              st.current_grade,
              sc.school_name,
              a.absent_days,
              f.failed_assessments
            FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = st.citizen_school_id_fk
            JOIN absences a
              ON a.citizen_student_id_fk = st.citizen_student_id_pk
            JOIN failures f
              ON f.citizen_student_id_fk = st.citizen_student_id_pk
            WHERE st.social_category = 'SC'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
              AND a.absent_days >= 15
            ORDER BY a.absent_days DESC, f.failed_assessments DESC

details.question: Find eligible students in Anantapur whose school scheme benefit was sanctioned but not disbursed in 2025.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              st.citizen_student_id_pk,
              st.student_name,
              st.current_grade,
              sc.school_name,
              sm.scheme_name,
              bf.scheme_application_id,
              bf.sanction_date,
              bf.expected_disbursement_date,
              bf.delay_days,
              bf.payment_failure_reason_code
            FROM curated_datamodels.scheme_benefits_fact bf
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
              ON st.citizen_student_id_pk = bf.citizen_student_id_fk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = bf.citizen_school_id_fk
            LEFT JOIN curated_datamodels.school_scheme_master sm
              ON sm.school_scheme_dim_id_pk = bf.school_scheme_master_id_fk
            WHERE bf.academic_year = '2025'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
              AND bf.eligible_flag = 'Y'
              AND bf.benefit_sanctioned_flag = 'Y'
              AND COALESCE(bf.benefit_disbursed_flag, 'N') <> 'Y'
            ORDER BY bf.delay_days DESC

details.question: Rank GSWS secretariats in Anantapur by number of high-risk students in 2025-26.
details.ground_truth_sql:
WITH risk_students AS (
              SELECT
                att.citizen_student_id_fk,
                sc.district_lgd_code,
                sc.mandal_lgd_code,
                COUNT(*) AS absent_days
              FROM curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
              JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
                ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = att.student_school_id_fk
              WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'
                AND att.absent_flag = 'Y'
                AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
              GROUP BY att.citizen_student_id_fk, sc.district_lgd_code, sc.mandal_lgd_code
              HAVING COUNT(*) >= 20
            )
            SELECT
              gs.district_name,
              gs.mandal_name,
              gs.secretariat_code,
              gs.secretariat_name,
              gs.rural_urban_flag,
              COUNT(DISTINCT rs.citizen_student_id_fk) AS high_risk_students,
              ROUND(AVG(rs.absent_days), 2) AS avg_absent_days
            FROM risk_students rs
            JOIN curated_datamodels.gsws_sec_secretariat_master gs
              ON gs.lgd_dist_code = rs.district_lgd_code
             AND gs.lgd_mandal_code = rs.mandal_lgd_code
            GROUP BY gs.district_name, gs.mandal_name, gs.secretariat_code, gs.secretariat_name, gs.rural_urban_flag
            ORDER BY high_risk_students DESC, avg_absent_days DESC

details.question: Find schools in Anantapur where present students were not served mid-day meals in 2025.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              sc.district_name,
              sc.mandal_name,
              sc.school_udise_code,
              sc.school_name,
              COUNT(CASE WHEN mdm.meal_served_flag = 'N' THEN 1 END) AS not_served_days,
              COUNT(*) AS total_days,
              ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN mdm.meal_served_flag = 'N' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS not_served_pct,
              MAX(mdm.meal_not_served_reason_code) AS latest_reason_code
            FROM curated_datamodels.mid_day_meal_serving_fact mdm
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = mdm.citizen_school_id_fk
            WHERE mdm.academic_year = '2025'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
            GROUP BY sc.district_name, sc.mandal_name, sc.school_udise_code, sc.school_name
            HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN mdm.meal_served_flag = 'N' THEN 1 END) > 0
            ORDER BY not_served_pct DESC

details.question: List students from LOW ration-card households in Anantapur who have 15 or more absences in 2025.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              st.citizen_student_id_pk,
              st.student_name,
              st.current_grade,
              rf.ration_card_no,
              rf.card_type_code,
              sc.school_name,
              COUNT(*) AS absent_days
            FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
            JOIN curated_datamodels.ration_card_citizen rc
              ON rc.citizen_master_fk = st.student_citizen_master_id_fk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.ration_card_family rf
              ON rf.ration_card_family_pk = rc.ration_card_family_fk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
              ON att.citizen_student_id_fk = st.citizen_student_id_pk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = att.student_school_id_fk
            WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'
              AND att.absent_flag = 'Y'
              AND rf.card_type_code = 'LOW'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
            GROUP BY st.citizen_student_id_pk, st.student_name, st.current_grade,
                     rf.ration_card_no, rf.card_type_code, sc.school_name
            HAVING COUNT(*) >= 15
            ORDER BY absent_days DESC

details.question: Give dropout-risk students in Anantapur with citizen family, address, and electricity meter profile details for 2025.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              ts_addr.citizen_student_id_pk,
              ts_addr.full_name,
              ts_addr.student_name,
              ts_addr.current_grade,
              fam.realtionship,
              ts_addr.pin_code,
              ts_addr.school_name,
              ts_addr.socio_economic_signal,
              ts_addr.absent_days
            FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_family_master fam
            RIGHT JOIN (
              SELECT addr.pin_code, ts_asset.*
              FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_address_master addr
              RIGHT JOIN (
                SELECT elec.meter_type AS socio_economic_signal, ts_cm.*
                FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_asset_electricity elec
                RIGHT JOIN (
                  SELECT cm.full_name, ts.*

details.question: Summarize dropout risk for Upper Primary students in Anantapur during 2025.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              sc.district_name,
              sc.mandal_name,
              cls.education_stage,
              cls.class_name,
              COUNT(DISTINCT st.citizen_student_id_pk) AS enrolled_students,
              COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN att.absent_flag = 'Y' THEN st.citizen_student_id_pk END) AS students_with_absence,
              SUM(CASE WHEN att.absent_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absent_records
            FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = st.citizen_school_id_fk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
              ON att.citizen_student_id_fk = st.citizen_student_id_pk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.student_class_dim cls
              ON cls.student_class_dim_id_pk = att.student_class_dim_id_fk
            WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
              AND cls.education_stage = 'Upper Primary'
            GROUP BY sc.district_name, sc.mandal_name, cls.education_stage, cls.class_name
            ORDER BY absent_records DESC

            FROM curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = att.student_school_id_fk
            LEFT JOIN curated_datamodels.absent_reason_dim ar

              SUM(CASE WHEN ta.on_leave_flag = 'Y' OR ta.late_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS teacher_issue_records,
              COUNT(DISTINCT sa.citizen_student_id_fk) AS absent_students
            FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
            LEFT JOIN curated_datamodels.school_teacher_attendance_fact ta
              ON ta.academic_year = '2025'
            JOIN curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact sa
              ON sa.student_school_id_fk = sc.citizen_school_id_pk
             AND ta.citizen_student_id_fk = sa.citizen_student_id_fk
            WHERE sa.academic_year = '2025'
              AND sa.absent_flag = 'Y'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
            GROUP BY sc.district_name, sc.mandal_name, sc.school_udise_code, sc.school_name
            HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN ta.on_leave_flag = 'Y' OR ta.late_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
            ORDER BY teacher_issue_records DESC, absent_students DESC

details.question: Compare dropout-risk absence for TEL medium students in Anantapur during 2025.

SELECT
              sm.medium_code,

            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc

            WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'

              AND sm.medium_code = 'TEL'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
            GROUP BY sm.medium_code, sm.medium_name, sc.district_name, sc.mandal_name

details.question: Create a prioritized dropout intervention queue for Anantapur in 2025.
details.ground_truth_sql:
WITH attendance_risk AS (
              SELECT citizen_student_id_fk, COUNT(*) AS absent_days
              FROM curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact
              WHERE academic_year = '2025' AND absent_flag = 'Y'
              GROUP BY citizen_student_id_fk
            ),
            academic_risk AS (
              SELECT citizen_student_id_fk,
                     SUM(CASE WHEN fail_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_assessments,
                     SUM(CASE WHEN absent_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS exam_absences
              FROM curated_datamodels.school_academic_performance_fact
              WHERE academic_year = '2025'
              GROUP BY citizen_student_id_fk
            ),
            benefit_risk AS (
              SELECT citizen_student_id_fk,
                     SUM(CASE WHEN eligible_flag = 'Y' AND COALESCE(benefit_disbursed_flag, 'N') <> 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS benefit_gaps
              FROM curated_datamodels.scheme_benefits_fact
              WHERE academic_year = '2025'
              GROUP BY citizen_student_id_fk
            )
            SELECT
              st.citizen_student_id_pk,
              st.student_name,
              st.primary_mobile_no,
              st.current_grade,
              sc.school_name,
              COALESCE(ar.absent_days, 0) AS absent_days,
              COALESCE(ac.failed_assessments, 0) AS failed_assessments,
              COALESCE(ac.exam_absences, 0) AS exam_absences,
              COALESCE(br.benefit_gaps, 0) AS benefit_gaps,
              COALESCE(ar.absent_days, 0)
                + 5 * COALESCE(ac.failed_assessments, 0)
                + 3 * COALESCE(ac.exam_absences, 0)
                + 4 * COALESCE(br.benefit_gaps, 0) AS dropout_risk_score
            FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = st.citizen_school_id_fk
            LEFT JOIN attendance_risk ar
              ON ar.citizen_student_id_fk = st.citizen_student_id_pk
            LEFT JOIN academic_risk ac
              ON ac.citizen_student_id_fk = st.citizen_student_id_pk
            LEFT JOIN benefit_risk br
              ON br.citizen_student_id_fk = st.citizen_student_id_pk
            WHERE sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
              AND COALESCE(st.is_current_flag, st.is_current) = 'Y'
              AND (
                COALESCE(ar.absent_days, 0) >= 15
                OR COALESCE(ac.failed_assessments, 0) > 0
                OR COALESCE(br.benefit_gaps, 0) > 0
              )
            ORDER BY dropout_risk_score DESC

details.question: List students in Anantapur who were absent from summative assessments in 2025-26.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              st.citizen_student_id_pk,
              st.student_name,
              sc.school_name,
              cls.class_name,
              ad.assessment_name,
              ad.assessment_type,
              perf.assessment_cycle,
              COUNT(*) AS exam_absence_count
            FROM curated_datamodels.school_academic_performance_fact perf
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
              ON st.citizen_student_id_pk = perf.citizen_student_id_fk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = perf.citizen_school_id_fk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.student_class_dim cls
              ON cls.student_class_dim_id_pk = perf.student_class_dim_id_fk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.assessment_dim ad
              ON ad.assessment_dim_id_pk = perf.assessment_dim_id_fk
            WHERE perf.academic_year = '2025'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
              AND perf.absent_flag = 'Y'
              AND ad.is_summative = 'Y'
            GROUP BY st.citizen_student_id_pk, st.student_name, sc.school_name,
                     cls.class_name, ad.assessment_name, ad.assessment_type, perf.assessment_cycle
            ORDER BY exam_absence_count DESC

details.question: Prepare a contact list for high-absence students in Anantapur for 2025, including guardian and address details.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              ts_addr.citizen_student_id_pk,
              ts_addr.student_name,
              ts_addr.primary_mobile_no,
              ts_addr.secondary_mobile_no,
              ts_addr.guardian_name,
              fam.realtionship AS guardian_relationship,
              ts_addr.address_line_1,
              ts_addr.pin_code,
              ts_addr.school_name,
              ts_addr.absent_days
            FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_family_master fam
            RIGHT JOIN (
              SELECT addr.address_line_1, addr.pin_code, ts_guard.*
              FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_address_master addr
              RIGHT JOIN (
                SELECT guardian.full_name AS guardian_name, ts.*
                FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_master guardian
                RIGHT JOIN (
                  SELECT
                    st.citizen_student_id_pk,
                    st.student_citizen_master_id_fk,
                    st.student_name,
                    st.primary_mobile_no,
                    st.secondary_mobile_no,
                    st.guardian_citizen_master_id_fk,
                    sc.school_name,
                    COUNT(*) AS absent_days
                  FROM curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
                  JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
                    ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = att.student_school_id_fk
                  JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
                    ON st.citizen_student_id_pk = att.citizen_student_id_fk
                  WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'
                    AND att.absent_flag = 'Y'
                    AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
                  GROUP BY st.citizen_student_id_pk, st.student_citizen_master_id_fk, st.student_name,
                           st.primary_mobile_no, st.secondary_mobile_no, st.guardian_citizen_master_id_fk,
                           sc.school_name
                  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 20
                ) ts ON guardian.citizen_master_pk = ts.guardian_citizen_master_id_fk
                WHERE COALESCE(guardian.status_code, 'ACTIVE') = 'ACTIVE'
              ) ts_guard ON addr.citizen_master_fk = ts_guard.student_citizen_master_id_fk AND addr.is_primary = 1
            ) ts_addr ON fam.citizen_master_fk = ts_addr.student_citizen_master_id_fk
            ORDER BY absent_days DESC

details.question: Find high-absence students in Anantapur whose citizen education record is not marked as current for 2025.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              st.citizen_student_id_pk,
              st.student_name,
              st.current_grade,
              ce.qualification_level,
              ce.course_name,
              ce.institution_code,
              ce.current_qualification_flag,
              sc.school_name,
              COUNT(*) AS absent_days
            FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
            LEFT JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_education ce
              ON ce.citizen_master_fk = st.student_citizen_master_id_fk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
              ON att.citizen_student_id_fk = st.citizen_student_id_pk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = att.student_school_id_fk
            WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'
              AND att.absent_flag = 'Y'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
              AND COALESCE(ce.current_qualification_flag, 'N') <> 'Y'
            GROUP BY st.citizen_student_id_pk, st.student_name, st.current_grade,
                     ce.qualification_level, ce.course_name, ce.institution_code,
                     ce.current_qualification_flag, sc.school_name
            HAVING COUNT(*) >= 15
            ORDER BY absent_days DESC

details.question: Summarize dropout-risk absence for Primary schools in Anantapur during 2025-26.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              sc.district_name,
              sc.mandal_name,
              cat.category_type,
              cat.category_name,
              COUNT(DISTINCT att.citizen_student_id_fk) AS students_with_absence,

            FROM curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc

            JOIN curated_datamodels.school_category cat

            WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'

details.question: Identify high-absence students in Anantapur with no recent citizen welfare or health scheme support in 2025.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              st.citizen_student_id_pk,
              st.student_name,
              st.current_grade,
              sc.school_name,
              COUNT(*) AS absent_days
            FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
            LEFT JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_welfare_schemes cw
              ON cw.citizen_master_fk = st.student_citizen_master_id_fk
            LEFT JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_health_schemes ch
              ON ch.citizen_master_fk = st.student_citizen_master_id_fk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
              ON att.citizen_student_id_fk = st.citizen_student_id_pk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = att.student_school_id_fk
            WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'
              AND att.absent_flag = 'Y'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
              AND cw.citizen_master_fk IS NULL
              AND ch.citizen_master_fk IS NULL
            GROUP BY st.citizen_student_id_pk, st.student_name, st.current_grade, sc.school_name
            HAVING COUNT(*) >= 20
            ORDER BY absent_days DESC

details.question: show the 5 school which has the highest average attendence
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              sc.school_name,
              ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN att.present_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS attendance_pct
            FROM curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = att.student_school_id_fk
            GROUP BY sc.school_name
            ORDER BY attendance_pct DESC
            LIMIT 5

details.question: List students in Class 10 studying in schools where functional units are less than 50% of the total units, along with the physical progress percentage.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
  st.citizen_student_id_pk,
  st.student_name,
  st.current_grade,
  sc.school_name,
  inf.total_units,
  inf.functional_units,
  inf.physical_progress_percentage
FROM curated_datamodels.school_infrastructure_progress_fact inf
JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
  ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = inf.citizen_school_id_pk
JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
  ON st.citizen_school_id_fk = sc.citizen_school_id_pk
WHERE st.current_grade = '10'
  AND inf.total_units > 0
  AND (inf.functional_units / inf.total_units) < 0.5
ORDER BY inf.physical_progress_percentage ASC
LIMIT 20

details.question: Show me students affected by high teacher absence. List students where their assigned teachers were absent more than 10 times.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
  st.citizen_student_id_pk,
  st.student_name,
  st.current_grade,
  t.teacher_name,
  COUNT(ta.school_teacher_attendance_fact_id_pk) as teacher_absent_days
FROM curated_datamodels.school_teacher_attendance_fact ta
JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school_teacher t
  ON t.citizen_school_teacher_id_pk = ta.citizen_school_teacher_id_fk
JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
  ON st.citizen_student_id_pk = ta.citizen_student_id_fk
WHERE ta.present_flag = 'N'
GROUP BY
  st.citizen_student_id_pk, st.student_name, st.current_grade, t.teacher_name
HAVING COUNT(ta.school_teacher_attendance_fact_id_pk) > 10
ORDER BY teacher_absent_days DESC
LIMIT 20

details.question: List students who received mid day meals less than 5 times this academic year but have a percentage score below 40%.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
  st.citizen_student_id_pk,
  st.student_name,
  st.current_grade,
  ap.score,
  COUNT(mdm.mid_day_meal_serving_fact_id_pk) AS meals_served
FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
JOIN curated_datamodels.school_academic_performance_fact ap
  ON st.citizen_student_id_pk = ap.citizen_student_id_fk
LEFT JOIN curated_datamodels.mid_day_meal_serving_fact mdm
  ON st.citizen_school_id_fk = mdm.citizen_school_id_fk
WHERE ap.score < 40
GROUP BY
  st.citizen_student_id_pk, st.student_name, st.current_grade, ap.score
HAVING COUNT(mdm.mid_day_meal_serving_fact_id_pk) < 5
ORDER BY meals_served ASC, ap.score ASC
LIMIT 20

details.question: Identify students who failed in Science and have more than 20 days of absence. Include their school name.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
  st.citizen_student_id_pk,
  st.student_name,
  sc.school_name,
  ap.score,
  COUNT(att.school_student_attendance_fact_id_pk) AS absent_days
FROM curated_datamodels.school_academic_performance_fact ap
JOIN curated_datamodels.school_subject_master sub
  ON sub.subject_pk = ap.student_subject_id_fk
JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
  ON st.citizen_student_id_pk = ap.citizen_student_id_fk
JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
  ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = st.citizen_school_id_fk
JOIN curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
  ON st.citizen_student_id_pk = att.citizen_student_id_fk
WHERE sub.subject_name = 'Science'
  AND ap.fail_flag = 'Y'
  AND att.absent_flag = 'Y'
GROUP BY
  st.citizen_student_id_pk, st.student_name, sc.school_name, ap.score
HAVING COUNT(att.school_student_attendance_fact_id_pk) > 20
ORDER BY absent_days DESC
LIMIT 20

details.question: Which schools have infrastructure projects with less than 20% financial progress but physical progress is over 80%?
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
  sc.school_udise_code,
  sc.school_name,
  inf.work_order_no,
  inf.physical_progress_percentage,
  inf.financial_progress_percentage,
  inf.estimated_cost_amount
FROM curated_datamodels.school_infrastructure_progress_fact inf
JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
  ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = inf.citizen_school_id_pk
WHERE inf.physical_progress_percentage > 80
  AND inf.financial_progress_percentage < 20
ORDER BY inf.estimated_cost_amount DESC
LIMIT 20

details.question: Give me students who are eligible for schemes but benefit disbursed flag is N and they are in grade 9.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
  st.citizen_student_id_pk,
  st.student_name,
  st.current_grade,
  sb.delay_days,
  sb.payment_failure_reason_code
FROM curated_datamodels.scheme_benefits_fact sb
JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
  ON st.citizen_student_id_pk = sb.citizen_student_id_fk
WHERE sb.eligible_flag = 'Y'
  AND sb.benefit_disbursed_flag = 'N'
  AND st.current_grade = '9'
ORDER BY sb.delay_days DESC
LIMIT 20

details.question: Show me the top 10 schools with the highest number of teachers who have only basic academic qualifications but no professional qualification.
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
  sc.school_name,
  COUNT(t.citizen_school_teacher_id_pk) AS underqualified_teachers
FROM curated_datamodels.citizen_school_teacher t
JOIN curated_datamodels.school_teacher_attendance_fact ta
  ON t.citizen_school_teacher_id_pk = ta.citizen_school_teacher_id_fk
JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
  ON st.citizen_student_id_pk = ta.citizen_student_id_fk
JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
  ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = st.citizen_school_id_fk
WHERE t.professional_qualification IS NULL
   OR t.professional_qualification = 'None'
GROUP BY sc.school_name
ORDER BY underqualified_teachers DESC
LIMIT 10
